name: Nordic Mining
longBusinessSummary: Nordic Mining ASA, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and development of industrial minerals and metals in Norway. The company primarily explores for rutile, almandine garnet, hydrothermal quartz vein, and seabed minerals. It owns 100% interest in the Engebø Rutile and Garnet project located in the Sunnfjord, Vestland, Norway; Nordic Titanium located in Sunnfjord, Vestland, Norway; and Kvinnherad Quartz Project located in Kvinnherad, Norway. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Oslo, Norway.
